subcodes.first_line: O Zayn, upon whom rest My glory and the glory of the Concourse on High! That which thou didst send hath reached Our gaze, and We beheld it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین علیک بهائی و بهاء الملا الاعلی آنچه ارسال نمودی بلحاظ فائز دیدیم و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
